comment.body: 6015.90 is the main pivot level from a momentum perspective. This acts as a critical threshold: if bullish momentum drives the spot price above this level, it could unlock upside gamma support, fueling further gains. However, 6068.72 emerges as a ceiling where long gamma begins to temper momentum and stabilize volatility, potentially slowing the upward move. On the downside, you’ve identified two zero vanna lines—one oscillating between 5911.65 and 5919 (leaning toward 5911.65) and another at 5982. Breaking through these requires lower local volatility, suggesting they’re acting as temporary barriers to downward pressure.
